mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SMS.SMS_HISTORY ( SENT_AT, RECEIVER_NO, SENDER_NO, SEND_TYPE, SEND_STATUS, RESULT_CD, RESULT_MSG ) VALUES ( #{sentAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{receiverNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{senderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SMS.SMS_HISTORY WHERE SMS_HISTORY_ID = #{smsHistoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND REQUEST_ID = #{requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
